mapper.select: SELECT user_id, available_assets, annual_income, monthly_savings, existing_loan_balance, existing_monthly_debt_payment FROM member_financial_profiles WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_financial_profiles ( user_id, available_assets, annual_income, monthly_savings, existing_loan_balance, existing_monthly_debt_payment ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{availableAssets}, #{annualIncome}, #{monthlySavings}, #{existingLoanBalance}, #{existingMonthlyDebtPayment} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE available_assets = VALUES(available_assets), annual_income = VALUES(annual_income), monthly_savings = VALUES(monthly_savings), existing_loan_balance = VALUES(existing_loan_balance), existing_monthly_debt_payment = VALUES(existing_monthly_debt_payment), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
